hypothesis: Incorporating AIMNet2-derived force (gradient) supervision into LoQI’s diffusion denoising objective will reduce the median post-generation relaxation energy (ΔErelax) on the ChEMBL3D hold-out set from 3.48 kcal·mol−1 to below 1.0 kcal·mol−1 while preserving ≥0.95 R/S and ≥0.99 E/Z stereochemistry accuracy.
